action: Correct the WebDriver BiDi browser-verification transcript to distinguish ordered events from command responses and hash decoded screenshot bytes.

progress.finding: script.evaluate and browsingContext.captureScreenshot are commands with correlated responses, not subscribable browser events
progress.handoff: Cloudflare and Vercel browser adapters must emit raw BiDi event messages and success/error command responses with stable command ids; they must not synthesize captureScreenshot or script.evaluate events.

limits: browser observation is not provenance or physical-output proof
